system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_kho_luyke_vattu","body":"-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_kho_luyke_vattu]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@vattu nvarchar(100),
	@tungay date
	--@denngay date
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	--declare @vattu nvarchar(100) = 'SBO403-5VN-588'
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	--  drop table #nhapxuat
	select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.mavt ORDER BY t.mavt) AS stt, t.*, m.tenvt, m.dvt
	into #nhapxuat
	from (
		(SELECT ctn.sopn as phieu,mavt,slnhap, 0 as slxuat,ctn.ngaynhap as ngay,ctn.ghichu
		from tr_ctphieunhap ctn inner join tr_phieunhap pn on pn.sopn = ctn.sopn
		where mavt = @vattu and pn.active = 1)
	union all
		(SELECT phieuxuat as phieu,mact as mavt,0 as slnhap, soluong as slxuat, ctx.ngaytao as ngay,ghichu	
		from tr_ctphieuxuat ctx inner join tr_phieuxuat px on px.sopx = ctx.phieuxuat
		where mact = @vattu and px.active = 1)
	) t inner join tr_material m on m.mavt = t.mavt
	order by ngay

	--  drop table #nhapxuat
	select t.ngay,t.phieu,t.mavt,t.tenvt,t.slnhap
		,(select sum(#nhapxuat.slnhap) as total from #nhapxuat where #nhapxuat.ngay <= t.ngay) as lkn
		,t.slxuat
		,(select sum(#nhapxuat.slxuat) as total from #nhapxuat where #nhapxuat.ngay <= t.ngay) as lkx
		,t.dvt,t.ghichu
	into #nxt
	from #nhapxuat as t

	select t.ngay as 'Ngày'
		,t.phieu as 'Phiếu'
		,t.mavt as 'Mã vật tư'
		,t.tenvt as 'Tên vật tư'
		,format(t.slnhap,'#.###') as 'Nhập'
		,format(t.lkn,'#.###') as 'Luỹ kế nhập'
		,format(t.slxuat,'#.###') as 'Xuất'
		,format(t.lkx,'#.###') as 'Luỹ kế xuất'
		,format(t.lkn - t.lkx,'#.###') as 'Tồn theo phiếu'
		,format(tks.soluong,'#.###') as 'Tồn hiện tại'
		,t.dvt as 'Đơn vị'
		,t.ghichu as 'Ghi chú'
	from #nxt as t inner join tr_tonkho_sum tks on tks.mavt = t.mavt
	order by t.ngay
	
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
